title: atalaya brevialata
intro: Atalaya brevialata, also known as the False Dragon's Blood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Atalaya brevialata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating wounds, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immune system booster. Atalaya brevialata can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture for medicinal purposes, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
